## Description

Brief description of what this PR adds or changes.

## Related Issue

Closes #[issue number]

## Type of Change

- [ ] New document
- [ ] Document update / correction
- [ ] New template
- [ ] Structural change
- [ ] Fix

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows naming conventions (`kebab-case.md`)
- [ ] Includes document header block (Type, Classification, Version, Author)
- [ ] No real PII, credentials, or sensitive data included
- [ ] Markdown renders correctly
- [ ] Linked from the relevant folder README or parent document
